name: Privilege Defined With Unsafe Actions
description: A privilege is defined in a way that allows it to be used to perform unintended unsafe actions, even when assigned to the correct entity. For example, a USER role inadvertently granted access to debug endpoints or administrative operations that should be restricted to ADMIN only.
detection_pattern: Look for AUTH nodes (role definitions, privilege specifications) that grant access to CONTROL or TRANSFORM nodes (dangerous operations, debug endpoints, system configuration, data deletion) without a CONTROL mediator (fine-grained permission check, action-level authorization) that restricts which specific actions each privilege level can perform.
